steps: Contact Goldman Sachs dividend operations to request refund of USD 2,025.00 overpayment on GOOGL dividend for account 1901234567
Provide documentation showing US-UK tax treaty rate should be 15% (USD 20,250 tax) not the 13.5% (USD 18,225) that was applied
Reference CLIENT03's treaty eligibility and request processing of excess withholding tax refund within standard timeframe
